title: Wema Bank’s Recapitalisation Efforts Get Boost with N40bn Rights Issue - FinancialEDGE
description: Wema Bank Plc has said that it successfully concluded the first tranche of its recapitalisation exercise having secured all relevant regulatory approvals for the allotment of its N40 billion Rights Issue, which was initiated in December 2023. In view of macroeconomic conditions, the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) in March 2024, launched a recapitalisation programme
html: Wema Bank Plc has said that it successfully concluded the first tranche of its recapitalisation exercise having secured all relevant regulatory approvals for the allotment of its N40 billion Rights Issue, which was initiated in December 2023.
